creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Aug 15, 2013 at 8:20 AM, John Marino <draco@marino.st> wrote:
>  hs-webkit just built during the last package run.
>  I didn't do anything, so one of it's dependencies must have adjusted

Okay, thanks for the update.
